nasb.text: For if you turn away from following Him, He will once more abandon them in the wilderness, and you will destroy all these people.”

esv.text: For if you turn away from following him, he will again abandon them in the wilderness, and you will destroy all this people.”

cnv.text: 如果你們轉離，不跟從他，他再要把以色列人撇在曠野，這樣，你們就要把整個民族都毀滅了。”

ccb.text: 如果你们离弃祂，祂必再次把以色列人丢弃在旷野，这样你们就毁了整个民族。”
